# RCSService.Business.SuggestedAction.Action.composeText(_:)

**Case**

Compose text action.

## Declaration

```swift
case composeText(RCSService.Business.ComposeTextAction)
```

## Handling composition actions

- **RCSService.Business.ComposeTextAction**: Compose a draft text message.
- **RCSService.Business.SuggestedAction.Action.composeRecording(_:)**: Compose recording action.
- **RCSService.Business.ComposeRecordingAction**: Compose a draft message with a media recording.

items.description: Compose a draft message with a media recording.
items.name: RCSService.Business.ComposeRecordingAction
